regime_feature_definitions.definition: Current ATR percentage percentile over the prior/current 50 closed candles.
Current ATR percentage percentile over the prior/current 100 closed candles.
Current high-low range divided by close.
SMA20 percentage change versus 10 closed candles earlier.
EMA10 percentage change versus 10 closed candles earlier.
EMA5 minus EMA10 divided by close.
EMA10 minus SMA20 divided by close.
Close minus SMA20 divided by SMA20.
Alias of the 20-candle high-low compression range.
Close location inside the 20-candle high-low range, 0=low and 1=high.
Absolute MACD histogram divided by close.
MACD histogram change from prior candle divided by close.
Absolute MACD-signal spread divided by close.
EMA10/SMA20 spread sign changes over the last 20 candles.
Close crossing EMA10 count over the last 20 candles.
20-candle net close progress divided by 20-candle range is below 0.2.

variant_definitions.logic: Block new long entries when ATR14 percent-of-price percentile over 100 candles is <= 20.
Block new long entries when ATR14 percent-of-price percentile over 100 candles is <= 30.
Block new long entries when absolute SMA20 10-bar slope is <= 0.25%.
Block new long entries when absolute EMA10 10-bar slope is <= 0.20%.
Block new long entries when 20-candle high-low range is <= 2.5% of close.
Block new long entries when 50-candle high-low range is <= 5.0% of close.
Block new long entries when MACD histogram and MACD-signal spread are both small relative to price.
Block new long entries only when at least two independent low-vol/flat/compression/MACD-flat conditions agree.

variant_summary.review_explanation: Aggregate PnL improved, but too many strong baseline control pockets lost return, so this should not be promoted without a narrower follow-up.
Aggregate PnL improved, but too many strong baseline control pockets lost return, so this should not be promoted without a narrower follow-up.
Not promoted after strict evidence review; control pockets damaged: 10.
Aggregate PnL fell versus baseline, so this is a hard rejection for this evidence pass.
Aggregate PnL and avoided-loser counts are directionally promising, but the result is not clean because drawdown worsened in at least one scenario and control pockets were damaged.
Large aggregate PnL improvement and avoided-loser skew, but promotion is blocked because worst-scenario drawdown worsened and control pockets were damaged.
The aggregate change was too small to justify more evidence despite avoiding more losers than winners.
Aggregate PnL improved, but too many strong baseline control pockets lost return, so this should not be promoted without a narrower follow-up.
